title: rottlera stipulosa
intro: Rottlera stipulosa, also known as the stembark tree or stembark, is a medicinal plant native to Southeast Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its various health benefits, which include its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The plant is believed to possess medicinal properties that can help alleviate fever, reduce swelling, and treat skin infections. Rottlera stipulosa is often prepared into herbal remedies such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
